summary: Mexico beat South Africa 2-0, with J. Quiñones (9') and R. Jiménez (67') scoring. South Korea won 2-1 against Czechia. L. Krejcí scored for Czechia (59'), but South Korea responded with goals from H. In-Beom (67') and O. Hyeon-Gyu (80') to claim victory.

Canada drew 1-1 with Bosnia-Herzegovina; J. Lukic scored for Bosnia-Herzegovina, C. Larin for Canada. The United States beat Paraguay 4-1, with F. Balogun (twice), D. Bobadilla, and G. Reyna scoring. Maurício netted for Paraguay.

Qatar drew 1-1 with Switzerland, M. Muheim scoring a late equalizer for Qatar. Brazil and Morocco also shared points in a 1-1 draw, I. Saibari scoring for Morocco and Vinícius Júnior for Brazil. Scotland secured a 1-0 victory over Haiti, thanks to a goal from J. McGinn.

Australia defeated Türkiye 2-0 (Irankunda, Metcalfe). Germany secured a dominant 7-1 victory over Curaçao, with six different scorers. Netherlands and Japan drew 2-2. Ivory Coast edged Ecuador 1-0 (Diallo). Sweden triumphed 5-1 against Tunisia, featuring a brace from Y. Ayari.

Today's World Cup results: Spain 0-0 Cape Verde. Belgium 1-1 Egypt (E. Ashour, M. Hany). Saudi Arabia 1-1 Uruguay (A. Al-Amri, M. Araújo). Iran and New Zealand drew 2-2, E. Just scoring twice for NZL, R. Rezaeian and M. Mohebbi for IRN.

France beat Senegal 3-1, with K. Mbappé scoring twice. Norway defeated Iraq 4-1, E. Haaland netting two goals. Lionel Messi's hat-trick secured Argentina a 3-0 victory over Algeria. B. Barcola, I. Mbaye, L. Østigard, and A. Hussein also scored.

Austria defeated Jordan 3-1 (R. Schmid, Y. Al-Arab). Portugal drew 1-1 with Congo DR (J. Neves, Y. Wissa). England beat Croatia 4-2, with Kane, Bellingham, Rashford scoring. Ghana edged Panama 1-0 (C. Yirenkyi). Colombia triumphed 3-1 over Uzbekistan (Muñoz, Díaz, Campaz).

World Cup results saw Czechia draw 1-1 with South Africa, M. Sadílek scoring. Switzerland beat Bosnia-Herzegovina 4-1, with J. Manzambi scoring twice. Canada thrashed Qatar 6-0, featuring a J. David hat-trick. Mexico secured a 1-0 win against South Korea, L. Romo scoring.

The United States beat Australia 2-0, with goals from C. Burgess and A. Freeman. Morocco secured a 1-0 victory over Scotland, I. Saibari scoring. Brazil dominated Haiti 3-0, M. Cunha netting twice and Vinícius Júnior once. Paraguay edged Türkiye 1-0, M. Galarza scoring.
progression: Australia has secured automatic qualification for the knockout stages by finishing second in Group D.

summary: The Netherlands defeated Sweden 5–1, with B. Brobbey and C. Gakpo both scoring twice, and C. Summerville adding a goal. A. Elanga scored for Sweden. Germany beat Ivory Coast 2–1, D. Undav scoring twice after F. Kessié's opener. Ecuador and Curaçao played to a 0–0 draw.

Japan secured a dominant 4-0 victory over Tunisia, with Ayase Ueda scoring twice. Spain also won convincingly, beating Saudi Arabia 4-0, featuring a brace from Mikel Oyarzabal. Belgium and Iran played out a goalless draw. Uruguay and Cape Verde shared the points in a 2-2 draw, while Egypt defeated New Zealand 3-1.
progression: Japan, Spain, Egypt, and Belgium have all secured their places in the knockout stages.

summary: Lionel Messi scored twice as Argentina beat Austria 2-0. Kylian Mbappé also netted a brace, with Ousmane Dembélé adding another, in France's 3-0 victory over Iraq. Erling Haaland's two goals helped Norway to a 3-2 win against Senegal, while Algeria defeated Jordan 2-1.
progression: As a result of today's victories, Norway, France, and Argentina have all confirmed their places in the knockout stage.

summary: Portugal thrashed Uzbekistan 5-0, with C. Ronaldo scoring twice, alongside goals from N. Mendes, A. Nematov, and R. Leão. England and Ghana drew 0-0. Croatia defeated Panama 1-0, A. Budimir scoring. Colombia secured a 1-0 win against Congo DR, with D. Muñoz finding the net.
progression: Colombia confirmed their place in the knockout stage after securing a 1-0 victory over Congo DR, guaranteeing a top-two finish in Group K.

summary: Bosnia-Herzegovina defeated Qatar 3-1. Switzerland beat Canada 2-1. Morocco secured a 4-2 victory over Haiti. Brazil dominated Scotland 3-0, with Vinícius Júnior scoring twice. Mexico won 3-0 against Czechia, and South Africa edged South Korea 1-0 thanks to T. Maseko's goal.
progression: Switzerland, Canada, Morocco, Brazil, Mexico, and South Africa all secured automatic knockout stage berths on the final matchday of their respective groups. Qatar, Haiti, and Czechia were all eliminated, each finishing fourth in their respective groups.

summary: Ivory Coast defeated Curaçao 2-0 with two goals from Nicolas Pépé. Ecuador beat Germany 2-1, while Japan and Sweden drew 1-1. Netherlands secured a 3-1 victory over Tunisia. Paraguay and Australia drew 0-0. Türkiye dramatically edged past United States 3-2.
progression: Germany, Ivory Coast, Netherlands, and the United States all clinched knockout stage places on the final matchday of the group stage. Türkiye, Curaçao, and Tunisia were all eliminated, each finishing fourth in their respective groups.

summary: France defeated Norway 4-1, featuring an O. Dembélé hat-trick. Senegal secured a dominant 5-0 win over Iraq. Cape Verde and Saudi Arabia drew 0-0, while Spain edged Uruguay 1-0. Egypt and Iran shared points in a 1-1 draw. Belgium triumphed 5-1 against New Zealand, with L. Trossard scoring twice.
progression: Cape Verde secured their place in the Round of 32, finishing second in their group behind Spain. Iraq, New Zealand, and Saudi Arabia were all eliminated, each finishing without enough points to advance.

summary: Croatia defeated Ghana 2-1 (Sucic, Vlasic). England beat Panama 2-0 (Bellingham, Kane). Colombia and Portugal drew 0-0. Congo DR overcame Uzbekistan 3-1. Algeria and Austria played a thrilling 3-3 draw, Mahrez scoring twice. Argentina secured a 3-1 win against Jordan.
progression: England, Croatia, Portugal, and Austria all secured their places in the knockout stage by finishing in the top two of their respective groups. Meanwhile, Panama, Uzbekistan, and Jordan were eliminated after finishing fourth.

summary: South Africa faced Canada, with Canada securing a narrow 1-0 victory. The decisive goal came late in the game, with S. Eustáquio finding the net for Canada in the 90'+2' minute, sealing the win.
